query:
SELECT 
  g.id as game_id,
  g.away_team as away_team,
  g.home_team as home_team,
  g.game_time,
  l_away.lineup_data as away_lineup,
  l_home.lineup_data as home_lineup,
  l_away.confirmed as away_confirmed,
  l_home.confirmed as home_confirmed
FROM mlb_games g
LEFT JOIN mlb_lineups l_away ON l_away.game_id = g.id AND l_away.team_type = 'away'
LEFT JOIN mlb_lineups l_home ON l_home.game_id = g.id AND l_home.team_type = 'home'
WHERE DATE(g.game_time) = '2026-03-26'
ORDER BY g.game_time ASC;
